title: alnus jorullensis var. ferruginea
intro: Alnus jorullensis var. ferruginea, also known as the rusty alder, is a variety of alder tree native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Alnus jorullensis var. ferruginea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health ailments and promote overall well-being.
